series_metadata.series_description: This series includes, but is not limited to, training manuals, quick reference guides and related materials that are used to train precinct election officials prior to an election.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for one (1) year or until replaced by updated training materials, whichever occurs first, then may destroy. ; Electronic: Retain for one (1) year or until replaced by updated training materials, whichever occurs first, then may destroy., Paper: Trash ; Electronic: Delete
